title: Shipping and Delivery Policy
intro: Please note that the free shipping policy will apply only if specified as part of promotional campaigns or special offers.
Please note our shipping policies as below.

points: A complete postal address including pin code, email id and contact number is essential to help us ship your order.
If the ordered item is in stock, it will be packed and dispatched within 3 working days.
If some items are not in stock, they will be produced and dispatched within 10 working days.
Courier partners deliver Monday to Saturday between 9am and 7pm.
Working days exclude public holidays and Sundays.
